source_text: I am so lonely in this big city without you.
target_text: तुम्हारे बिना इस बड़े शहर में मैं बहुत अकेला महसूस करता हूँ।
context_prev: Moving here was the biggest mistake of my career.
context_next: Every street reminds me of our home.
speaker: speaker_24
localization_notes: Lonely is translated to अकेला महसूस करता हूँ.

source_text: Everything we built together is gone in an instant.
target_text: మనం కలిసి నిర్మించుకున్నదంతా క్షణాల్లో బూడిదైపోయింది.
context_prev: The factory fire has destroyed the whole block.
context_next: There is nothing left but ashes.
speaker: speaker_73
localization_notes: Gone in an instant is localized to క్షణాల్లో బూడిదైపోయింది (turned to ashes in seconds).

source_text: I can't believe you managed to pull this off!
target_text: मुझे यकीन नहीं हो रहा कि तुम इसे करने में कामयाब रहे!
context_prev: The deal is signed, they agreed to all our terms.
context_next: This is going to change our fortunes overnight.
speaker: speaker_39
localization_notes: Pull this off to इसे करने में कामयाब रहे.

source_text: The museum is located right next to the historic fort.
target_text: మ్యూజియం చారిత్రాత్మక కోటకు సరిగ్గా పక్కనే ఉంది.
context_prev: Where should we start our city tour tomorrow?
context_next: Both places can be covered in one afternoon.
speaker: speaker_64
localization_notes: Fort to కోట, next to is పక్కనే.

source_text: Please submit the report by Friday afternoon.
target_text: कृपया शुक्रवार दोपहर तक रिपोर्ट जमा कर दें।
context_prev: The review meeting is scheduled for Monday.
context_next: I will review it over the weekend.
speaker: speaker_04
localization_notes: Standard business/formal Hindi.

source_text: Look at the corruption in this office, it is absolutely repulsive.
target_text: इस दफ्तर में फैले भ्रष्टाचार को देखो, यह बेहद घृणास्पद है।
context_prev: They are asking for bribes even for a death certificate.
context_next: We must report this to the vigilance department.
speaker: speaker_48
localization_notes: Repulsive to घृणास्पद, corruption to भ्रष्टाचार.

source_text: Shut your mouth before I lose my temper completely!
target_text: నేను నా సహనాన్ని కోల్పోయేలోపు నీ నోరు మూసుకో!
context_prev: You are a coward who cannot protect anyone.
context_next: I warned you once, don't push me further.
speaker: speaker_81
localization_notes: Shut mouth to నోరు మూసుకో, temper is సహనం.

source_text: I will wait for your call near the library gate.
target_text: मैं लाइब्रेरी के गेट के पास तुम्हारे फोन का इंतज़ार करूँगा।
context_prev: Class gets over at four in the afternoon.
context_next: Don't be late, we have a lot to discuss.
speaker: speaker_03
localization_notes: Uses 'फोन का इंतज़ार' instead of literal call translation.

source_text: He left without even saying a final goodbye to me.
target_text: అతను నాకు కనీసం వీడ్కోలు కూడా చెప్పకుండా వెళ్ళిపోయాడు.
context_prev: I searched the entire station but his train had left.
context_next: I don't think I will ever see him again.
speaker: speaker_72
localization_notes: Goodbye is వీడ్కోలు.

source_text: We need to check the coordinates on the map once more.
target_text: हमें मानचित्र पर निर्देशांकों की एक बार फिर जांच करनी होगी।
context_prev: The signal seems to be coming from the north sector.
context_next: It points to the old temple ruins.
speaker: speaker_01
localization_notes: Coordinates is translated to निर्देशांकों. Clear, formal register.

source_text: She treats her servants like dirt, it is sickening.
target_text: ఆమె తన పనివాళ్ళను కనీసం మనుషుల్లా కూడా చూడదు, ఇది చాలా దారుణం.
context_prev: I saw her shouting at the old cook yesterday.
context_next: No wonder nobody stays at her house for more than a week.
speaker: speaker_100
localization_notes: Sickening is translated to దారుణం (vile/awful behavior).

source_text: He makes me sick with his fake sympathy and lies.
target_text: उसकी झूठी हमदर्दी और झूठ से मुझे घिन आती है।
context_prev: He came to express condolences for father's death.
context_next: Everyone knows he was behind the conspiracy.
speaker: speaker_47
localization_notes: Makes me sick to घिन आती है (disgust expression).

source_text: Stop lying to me! I saw you holding her hand.
target_text: मुझसे झूठ बोलना बंद करो! मैंने तुम्हें उसका हाथ पकड़े हुए देखा था।
context_prev: She is just a colleague from the office, believe me.
context_next: Your relationship is over as of today.
speaker: speaker_29
localization_notes: High pitched anger. Stop lying isझूठ बोलना बंद करो.

source_text: This is the most beautiful sunset I have ever seen.
target_text: यह मेरे द्वारा देखा गया अब तक का सबसे खूबसूरत सूर्यास्त है।
context_prev: Look at the mountains, the sky is glowing.
context_next: I wish this moment would last forever.
speaker: speaker_20
localization_notes: Aesthetic appreciation. Uses खूबसूरत for beautiful.

source_text: Let us check the weather forecast before booking tickets.
target_text: टिकट बुक करने से पहले आइए मौसम का पूर्वानुमान देख लें।
context_prev: Monsoon rains might disrupt flights next week.
context_next: It's better to be safe than sorry.
speaker: speaker_13
localization_notes: Weather forecast is मौसम का पूर्वानुमान.

source_text: He left without even saying a final goodbye to me.
target_text: वह मुझसे आखिरी बार अलविदा कहे बिना ही चला गया।
context_prev: I searched the entire station but his train had left.
context_next: I don't think I will ever see him again.
speaker: speaker_22
localization_notes: Alvida (goodbye) adds cinematic pathos in Hindi.

source_text: We need to check the coordinates on the map once more.
target_text: మనం మ్యాప్‌లో ఉన్న కోఆర్డినేట్లను మరోసారి తనిఖీ చేయాలి.
context_prev: The signal seems to be coming from the north sector.
context_next: It points to the old temple ruins.
speaker: speaker_51
localization_notes: Standard map/coordinates Telugu translation.

source_text: How dare you speak to my mother in that tone!
target_text: तुम्हारी हिम्मत कैसे हुई मेरी माँ से उस लहजे में बात करने की!
context_prev: Tell her to mind her own business.
context_next: Get out of this house right now!
speaker: speaker_27
localization_notes: How dare you to तुम्हारी हिम्मत कैसे हुई. Tone to लहजा.

source_text: I think someone is following us from the station.
target_text: मुझे लगता है कि स्टेशन से कोई हमारा पीछा कर रहा है।
context_prev: That black car has taken the last three turns with us.
context_next: Walk faster, don't look back.
speaker: speaker_34
localization_notes: Following is translated to पीछा कर रहा है.

source_text: I need to renew my passport next month.
target_text: నేను వచ్చే నెల నా పాస్‌పోర్టును నవీకరించుకోవాలి.
context_prev: Our international trip is planned for October.
context_next: The visa process takes at least three weeks.
speaker: speaker_62
localization_notes: Renew to నవీకరించుకోవడం.

source_text: We won the lottery! Ten million rupees!
target_text: हम लॉटरी जीत गए! एक करोड़ रुपये!
context_prev: Check the numbers on the ticket with newspaper.
context_next: Tell me I am not dreaming right now.
speaker: speaker_44
localization_notes: Ten million rupees converted to Indian notation: एक करोड़ रुपये (1 Crore).

source_text: It is a miracle, the doctor says he is out of danger!
target_text: ఇది నిజంగా ఒక అద్భుతం, అతను ప్రమాదం నుండి బయటపడ్డాడని డాక్టర్ చెప్పారు!
context_prev: The surgery took six long hours.
context_next: Thank God, our prayers have been answered.
speaker: speaker_68
localization_notes: Miracle to అద్భుతం, out of danger is ప్రమాదం నుండి బయటపడటం.

source_text: Shut your mouth before I lose my temper completely!
target_text: अपना मुँह बंद रखो इससे पहले कि मैं अपना आपा पूरी तरह से खो दूँ!
context_prev: You are a coward who cannot protect anyone.
context_next: I warned you once, don't push me further.
speaker: speaker_31
localization_notes: Lose temper to आपा खोना.

source_text: Something is breathing right outside our bedroom door.
target_text: మన పడకగది తలుపు బయట ఎవరో గట్టిగా శ్వాస తీసుకుంటున్నారు.
context_prev: The dog started barking and then suddenly went silent.
context_next: Do you have the baseball bat?
speaker: speaker_88
localization_notes: Bedroom to పడకగది.

source_text: This is the limit, I will not tolerate this injustice anymore!
target_text: ఇక నా ఓపిక నశించింది, నేను ఈ అన్యాయాన్ని అస్సలు సహించను!
context_prev: They deducted our wages for the third time this month.
context_next: We will march to the owner's office tomorrow morning.
speaker: speaker_80
localization_notes: Limit is ఇక నా ఓపిక నశించింది (patience lost), tolerate to సహించను.

source_text: He was the undercover agent all this time?
target_text: అతను ఇన్ని రోజులుగా అండర్ కవర్ ఏజెంట్‌గా ఉన్నాడా?
context_prev: He just shot the gang leader and showed his badge.
context_next: No wonder he knew all our escape routes.
speaker: speaker_92
localization_notes: Undercover agent is kept as అండర్ కవర్ ఏజెంట్.

source_text: Please don't leave me alone in the dark, I am terrified.
target_text: దయచేసి నన్ను చీకటిలో ఒంటరిగా వదిలేయకు, నాకు చాలా భయంగా ఉంది.
context_prev: The power supply has been cut off from outside.
context_next: Did you hear that scraping sound on the wall?
speaker: speaker_83
localization_notes: Terrified to చాలా భయంగా ఉంది.

source_text: You sold your own brother's secrets for some money? Disgusting.
target_text: కొద్దిపాటి డబ్బు కోసం నీ స్వంత సోదరుడి రహస్యాలనే అమ్మేస్తావా? ఛీ, ఎంత అసహ్యంగా ఉందో.
context_prev: The bank statement shows he received the payment yesterday.
context_next: I don't even want to look at your face.
speaker: speaker_95
localization_notes: Disgusting to ఛీ, ఎంత అసహ్యంగా ఉందో (colloquial expression).

source_text: How can you eat that rotten meat? It looks vile.
target_text: तुम वो सड़ा हुआ मांस कैसे खा सकते हो? यह बहुत गंदा लग रहा है।
context_prev: It has been lying in the sun for two days.
context_next: Throw it in the trash bin immediately.
speaker: speaker_49
localization_notes: Rotten to सड़ा हुआ, meat to मांस, vile to गंदा.

source_text: Something is breathing right outside our bedroom door.
target_text: हमारे बेडरूम के दरवाज़े के ठीक बाहर कोई सांस ले रहा है।
context_prev: The dog started barking and then suddenly went silent.
context_next: Do you have the baseball bat?
speaker: speaker_38
localization_notes: Breathing right outside to ठीक बाहर कोई सांस ले रहा है.

source_text: What are you doing here? I thought you were in Delhi!
target_text: तुम यहाँ क्या कर रहे हो? मुझे लगा तुम दिल्ली में हो!
context_prev: The doorbell rang at midnight.
context_next: Did something happen back home?
speaker: speaker_40
localization_notes: Uses colloquial shock phrasing.

source_text: I can't believe you managed to pull this off!
target_text: నువ్వు నిజంగానే దీనిని సాధించావంటే నేను నమ్మలేకపోతున్నాను!
context_prev: The deal is signed, they agreed to all our terms.
context_next: This is going to change our fortunes overnight.
speaker: speaker_89
localization_notes: Pull this off to సాధించడం.

source_text: Please submit the report by Friday afternoon.
target_text: దయచేసి శుక్రవారం మధ్యాహ్నానికి నివేదికను సమర్పించండి.
context_prev: The review meeting is scheduled for Monday.
context_next: I will review it over the weekend.
speaker: speaker_54
localization_notes: Report translated to నివేదిక, submit to సమర్పించండి.

source_text: They decided to postpone the film release.
target_text: వారు సినిమా విడుదలను వాయిదా వేయాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నారు.
context_prev: The post-production work is still incomplete.
context_next: A new date will be announced soon.
speaker: speaker_55
localization_notes: Postpone is వాయిదా వేయడం.

source_text: This is the most beautiful sunset I have ever seen.
target_text: నేను నా జీవితంలో చూసిన అత్యంత అందమైన సూర్యాస్తమయం ఇదే.
context_prev: Look at the mountains, the sky is glowing.
context_next: I wish this moment would last forever.
speaker: speaker_70
localization_notes: Aesthetic sunset dialogue.

source_text: You are going to be a mother, we are having a baby!
target_text: तुम माँ बनने वाली हो, हमारा बच्चा आने वाला है!
context_prev: The report just arrived from the clinic.
context_next: This is the best day of my life!
speaker: speaker_19
localization_notes: Excited delivery, child announcement dialogue.

source_text: The keys are lying on the kitchen table.
target_text: తాళాలు వంటగది బల్లపై ఉన్నాయి.
context_prev: Have you seen my car keys anywhere?
context_next: Hurry up, we are running behind schedule.
speaker: speaker_59
localization_notes: Keys to తాళాలు, table to బల్ల.

source_text: The museum is located right next to the historic fort.
target_text: संग्रहालय ऐतिहासिक किले के ठीक बगल में स्थित है।
context_prev: Where should we start our city tour tomorrow?
context_next: Both places can be covered in one afternoon.
speaker: speaker_14
localization_notes: Museum to संग्रहालय, fort to किला.

source_text: How can you eat that rotten meat? It looks vile.
target_text: ఆ కుళ్ళిపోయిన మాంసాన్ని నువ్వు ఎలా తింటున్నావు? చూడటానికే చాలా ఛండాలంగా ఉంది.
context_prev: It has been lying in the sun for two days.
context_next: Throw it in the trash bin immediately.
speaker: speaker_99
localization_notes: Rotten to కుళ్ళిపోయిన, vile to ఛండాలంగా.

source_text: It hurts so much to know that you don't trust me anymore.
target_text: यह जानकर बहुत दुख होता है कि अब तुम्हें मुझ पर भरोसा नहीं रहा।
context_prev: You checked my phone when I was sleeping, didn't you?
context_next: We shouldn't stay together if there is no faith.
speaker: speaker_26
localization_notes: Trust to भरोसा, hurts to दुख होता है.

source_text: She treats her servants like dirt, it is sickening.
target_text: वह अपने नौकरों के साथ जानवरों जैसा व्यवहार करती है, यह बेहद घिनौना है।
context_prev: I saw her shouting at the old cook yesterday.
context_next: No wonder nobody stays at her house for more than a week.
speaker: speaker_50
localization_notes: Uses standard Hindi idiom 'जानवरों जैसा व्यवहार' (treating like dirt/animals) for better localization impact.

source_text: The store remains closed on national holidays.
target_text: राष्ट्रीय छुट्टियों पर दुकान बंद रहती है।
context_prev: Can we buy some groceries tomorrow?
context_next: We will have to wait until Tuesday morning.
speaker: speaker_11
localization_notes: National holidays to राष्ट्रीय छुट्टियों.

source_text: How dare you speak to my mother in that tone!
target_text: మా అమ్మతో ఆ రకంగా మాట్లాడటానికి నీకు ఎంత ధైర్యం!
context_prev: Tell her to mind her own business.
context_next: Get out of this house right now!
speaker: speaker_77
localization_notes: How dare you is నీకు ఎంత ధైర్యం.

source_text: Look! The dry plant has suddenly started blooming!
target_text: देखो! सूखे पौधे पर अचानक फूल खिलने लगे हैं!
context_prev: I forgot to water it for almost three months.
context_next: This is truly a beautiful sight.
speaker: speaker_43
localization_notes: Blooming is translated to फूल खिलने लगे हैं.

source_text: We won the lottery! Ten million rupees!
target_text: మనకు లాటరీ తగిలింది! కోటి రూపాయలు!
context_prev: Check the numbers on the ticket with newspaper.
context_next: Tell me I am not dreaming right now.
speaker: speaker_94
localization_notes: 10 million rupees is translated to కోటి రూపాయలు (1 Crore).

source_text: I trusted you with my life, and you sold me out!
target_text: నిన్ను నా ప్రాణం కంటే ఎక్కువగా నమ్మాను, కానీ నువ్వు నన్ను నట్టేట ముంచావు!
context_prev: I had no choice, they threatened my children.
context_next: Don't look at me, you are dead to me now.
speaker: speaker_78
localization_notes: sold me out is translated to నట్టేట ముంచావు (Telugu betrayal idiom meaning left stranded in deep waters).

source_text: He was the undercover agent all this time?
target_text: वह इतने समय से अंडरकवर एजेंट था?
context_prev: He just shot the gang leader and showed his badge.
context_next: No wonder he knew all our escape routes.
speaker: speaker_42
localization_notes: Undercover agent is kept as अंडरकवर एजेंट as standard in Hindi cinema.

source_text: They decided to postpone the film release.
target_text: उन्होंने फिल्म की रिलीज़ को टालने का फैसला किया।
context_prev: The post-production work is still incomplete.
context_next: A new date will be announced soon.
speaker: speaker_05
localization_notes: Uses टालने for postpone, standard Hindi.

source_text: I trusted you with my life, and you sold me out!
target_text: मैंने अपनी जान से बढ़कर तुम पर भरोसा किया था, और तुमने मुझे बेच दिया!
context_prev: I had no choice, they threatened my children.
context_next: Don't look at me, you are dead to me now.
speaker: speaker_28
localization_notes: sold me out is translated to तुमने मुझे बेच दिया (betrayal idiom).

source_text: I finally got the job offer I was praying for!
target_text: నేను ఏ ఉద్యోగం కోసమైతే దేవుడిని కోరుకున్నానో ఆ జాబ్ ఆఫర్ వచ్చేసింది!
context_prev: They said they would call by five today.
context_next: We are going to celebrate tonight, my treat!
speaker: speaker_65
localization_notes: Prays to దేవుడిని కోరుకోవడం, job offer to జాబ్ ఆఫర్. Natural Telugu film phrasing.

source_text: You need to show your ID card at the counter.
target_text: మీరు కౌంటర్ వద్ద మీ గుర్తింపు కార్డును చూపించాలి.
context_prev: Security is very tight at the entrance today.
context_next: Otherwise, they will not let you enter the office.
speaker: speaker_60
localization_notes: ID card to గుర్తింపు కార్డు.

source_text: He makes me sick with his fake sympathy and lies.
target_text: అతడి నకిలీ సానుభూతి మరియు అబద్ధాలు చూస్తుంటే నాకు అసహ్యం వేస్తోంది.
context_prev: He came to express condolences for father's death.
context_next: Everyone knows he was behind the conspiracy.
speaker: speaker_97
localization_notes: Makes me sick to అసహ్యం వేస్తోంది.

source_text: You ruined my life, and you think you can walk away?
target_text: तुमने मेरी जिंदगी बर्बाद कर दी, और तुम्हें लगता है कि तुम बचकर निकल सकते हो?
context_prev: I am leaving for London tonight, forget about me.
context_next: Karma will find you, mark my words.
speaker: speaker_32
localization_notes: Ruined is बर्बाद, walk away is बचकर निकलना.

source_text: I will wait for your call near the library gate.
target_text: నేను లైబ్రరీ గేట్ దగ్గర నీ ఫోన్ కోసం ఎదురుచూస్తుంటాను.
context_prev: Class gets over at four in the afternoon.
context_next: Don't be late, we have a lot to discuss.
speaker: speaker_53
localization_notes: Uses 'నేను లైబ్రరీ గేట్ దగ్గర నీ ఫోన్ కోసం ఎదురుచూస్తుంటాను' (waiting for your phone/call).

source_text: I am so happy to see you after all these years!
target_text: इतने सालों बाद तुम्हें देखकर मुझे बहुत खुशी हो रही है!
context_prev: The plane has landed, she is walking out.
context_next: Come here, let me give you a big hug.
speaker: speaker_17
localization_notes: Expressive warmth suitable for family reunion scene.

source_text: You need to show your ID card at the counter.
target_text: आपको काउंटर पर अपना पहचान पत्र दिखाना होगा।
context_prev: Security is very tight at the entrance today.
context_next: Otherwise, they will not let you enter the office.
speaker: speaker_10
localization_notes: ID card is translated to पहचान पत्र.

source_text: The kitchen is crawling with cockroaches and smells awful.
target_text: వంటగది అంతా బొద్దింకలు ప్రాకుతున్నాయి మరియు అక్కడ విపరీతమైన దుర్వాసన వస్తోంది.
context_prev: Nobody has cleaned this restaurant pantry in months.
context_next: I am not eating a single bite from this place.
speaker: speaker_96
localization_notes: Cockroaches to బొద్దింకలు, smells awful to దుర్వాసన.

source_text: I need to renew my passport next month.
target_text: मुझे अगले महीने अपने पासपोर्ट का नवीनीकरण कराना है।
context_prev: Our international trip is planned for October.
context_next: The visa process takes at least three weeks.
speaker: speaker_12
localization_notes: Renew is नवीनीकरण कराना.

source_text: Look at this, we won the championship trophy!
target_text: ఇది చూడండి, మనం ఛాంపియన్‌షిప్ ట్రోఫీ గెలిచాం!
context_prev: The final whistle has blown, it is over!
context_next: I cannot believe all our hard work paid off.
speaker: speaker_66
localization_notes: Excited celebratory speech.

source_text: The kitchen is crawling with cockroaches and smells awful.
target_text: रसोई में हर तरफ तिलचट्टे रेंग रहे हैं और वहां भयानक बदबू आ रही है।
context_prev: Nobody has cleaned this restaurant pantry in months.
context_next: I am not eating a single bite from this place.
speaker: speaker_46
localization_notes: Cockroaches to तिलचट्टे, smells awful to भयानक बदबू.

source_text: I think someone is following us from the station.
target_text: స్టేషన్ నుండి ఎవరో మనల్ని వెంబడిస్తున్నారని నా అనుమానం.
context_prev: That black car has taken the last three turns with us.
context_next: Walk faster, don't look back.
speaker: speaker_84
localization_notes: Following is వెంబడించడం.

source_text: Please don't leave me alone in the dark, I am terrified.
target_text: कृपया मुझे अंधेरे में अकेला मत छोड़ो, मैं बहुत डरा हुआ हूँ।
context_prev: The power supply has been cut off from outside.
context_next: Did you hear that scraping sound on the wall?
speaker: speaker_33
localization_notes: Terrified to बहुत डरा हुआ हूँ.

source_text: This is the limit, I will not tolerate this injustice anymore!
target_text: यह हद हो गई, मैं अब इस अन्याय को और बर्दाश्त नहीं करूँगा!
context_prev: They deducted our wages for the third time this month.
context_next: We will march to the owner's office tomorrow morning.
speaker: speaker_30
localization_notes: Limit to हद, tolerate to बर्दाश्त, injustice to अन्याय.

source_text: Everything we built together is gone in an instant.
target_text: जो कुछ भी हमने साथ मिलकर बनाया था, वह एक पल में खत्म हो गया।
context_prev: The factory fire has destroyed the whole block.
context_next: There is nothing left but ashes.
speaker: speaker_23
localization_notes: Uses 'एक पल में खत्म' for gone in an instant.

source_text: The train usually arrives at platform number four.
target_text: రైలు సాధారణంగా నాలుగో నంబర్ ప్లాట్‌ఫారమ్ మీదకు వస్తుంది.
context_prev: Which way is the ticket counter?
context_next: We have about twenty minutes left.
speaker: speaker_52
localization_notes: Colloquial Telugu for railway station context.

source_text: The store remains closed on national holidays.
target_text: జాతీయ సెలవు దినాల్లో ఈ దుకాణం మూసివేయబడుతుంది.
context_prev: Can we buy some groceries tomorrow?
context_next: We will have to wait until Tuesday morning.
speaker: speaker_61
localization_notes: National holidays to జాతీయ సెలవు దినాలు.

source_text: I am so happy to see you after all these years!
target_text: ఇన్ని సంవత్సరాల తర్వాత నిన్ను చూడటం నాకు చాలా సంతోషంగా ఉంది!
context_prev: The plane has landed, she is walking out.
context_next: Come here, let me give you a big hug.
speaker: speaker_67
localization_notes: Happy to see you is నిన్ను చూడటం సంతోషంగా ఉంది.

source_text: Look at the corruption in this office, it is absolutely repulsive.
target_text: ఈ ఆఫీసులో ఉన్న అవినీతిని చూడు, ఇది ఎంత అసహ్యకరంగా ఉందో.
context_prev: They are asking for bribes even for a death certificate.
context_next: We must report this to the vigilance department.
speaker: speaker_98
localization_notes: Repulsive to అసహ్యకరం, corruption to అవినీతి.

source_text: I could not save him, no matter how hard I tried.
target_text: నేను ఎంత ప్రయత్నించినా అతడిని బతికించుకోలేకపోయాను.
context_prev: The pulse stopped before the ambulance arrived.
context_next: How am I going to face his family now?
speaker: speaker_71
localization_notes: బతికించుకోలేకపోయాను (could not save life) is highly emotional and natural.

source_text: If they find us here, they will kill us both.
target_text: अगर उन्होंने हमें यहाँ ढूंढ लिया, तो वे हम दोनों को मार डालेंगे।
context_prev: We need to stay hidden until the patrol guards pass.
context_next: Don't even breathe loudly.
speaker: speaker_37
localization_notes: Kill us both to हम दोनों को मार डालेंगे.

source_text: My grandmother passed away quietly in her sleep last night.
target_text: मेरी दादी का कल रात नींद में ही शांति से देहांत हो गया।
context_prev: She had been weak for the past couple of weeks.
context_next: She lived a long and beautiful life.
speaker: speaker_25
localization_notes: Passed away is respectfully translated to देहांत हो गया.

source_text: You sold your own brother's secrets for some money? Disgusting.
target_text: तुमने थोड़े से पैसों के लिए अपने ही भाई के राज़ बेच दिए? घिनौना है ये।
context_prev: The bank statement shows he received the payment yesterday.
context_next: I don't even want to look at your face.
speaker: speaker_45
localization_notes: Disgusting to घिनौना.

source_text: The brakes aren't working! I can't stop the car!
target_text: ब्रेक काम नहीं कर रहे हैं! मैं कार रोक नहीं पा रहा हूँ!
context_prev: We are heading down a very steep mountain road.
context_next: Pull the handbrake, hurry!
speaker: speaker_36
localization_notes: Immediate panic. Brakes to ब्रेक.

source_text: It hurts so much to know that you don't trust me anymore.
target_text: నువ్వు నన్ను ఇక నమ్మడం లేదని తెలియడం నన్ను చాలా బాధపెడుతోంది.
context_prev: You checked my phone when I was sleeping, didn't you?
context_next: We shouldn't stay together if there is no faith.
speaker: speaker_76
localization_notes: Hurts to బాధపెడుతోంది, trust to నమ్మడం.

source_text: Stop lying to me! I saw you holding her hand.
target_text: నాతో అబద్ధాలు చెప్పడం ఆపు! నువ్వు ఆమె చేయి పట్టుకోవడం నేను చూశాను.
context_prev: She is just a colleague from the office, believe me.
context_next: Your relationship is over as of today.
speaker: speaker_79
localization_notes: Holding hand to చేయి పట్టుకోవడం.

source_text: You ruined my life, and you think you can walk away?
target_text: నా జీవితాన్ని నాశనం చేసి, నువ్వు ఏమీ తెలియనట్టు వెళ్లిపోదామనుకుంటున్నావా?
context_prev: I am leaving for London tonight, forget about me.
context_next: Karma will find you, mark my words.
speaker: speaker_82
localization_notes: Ruined is నాశనం చేయడం, walk away is ఏమీ తెలియనట్టు వెళ్లిపోవడం.

source_text: Let us check the weather forecast before booking tickets.
target_text: టిక్కెట్లు బుక్ చేసుకునే ముందు వాతావరణ నివేదికను చూద్దాం.
context_prev: Monsoon rains might disrupt flights next week.
context_next: It's better to be safe than sorry.
speaker: speaker_63
localization_notes: Weather forecast is translated to వాతావరణ నివేదిక.

source_text: Look! The dry plant has suddenly started blooming!
target_text: చూడు! ఆ ఎండిపోయిన మొక్కకు అకస్మాత్తుగా పువ్వులు పూశాయి!
context_prev: I forgot to water it for almost three months.
context_next: This is truly a beautiful sight.
speaker: speaker_93
localization_notes: blooming to పువ్వులు పూశాయి.

source_text: We should carry extra water for the desert trek.
target_text: ఎడారి ప్రయాణం కోసం మనం అదనంగా నీటిని తీసుకెళ్లాలి.
context_prev: The weather forecast predicts a dry spell.
context_next: Dehydration is a serious risk there.
speaker: speaker_57
localization_notes: Desert is ఎడారి, carry water is నీటిని తీసుకెళ్లాలి.

source_text: I could not save him, no matter how hard I tried.
target_text: मैं उसे बचा नहीं पाया, चाहे मैंने कितनी भी कोशिश की हो।
context_prev: The pulse stopped before the ambulance arrived.
context_next: How am I going to face his family now?
speaker: speaker_21
localization_notes: Heavy regret. Hindi uses 'चाहे... कितनी भी'.
